verdict_reason: New test asserts the referenceNumber param reaches the backend URL; only an encoding edge case is untested

todos.issue: The new findAll test only covers a plain reference; no case asserts that a value needing encoding (spaces, ampersand, unicode) is escaped in the outgoing URL, which is the main risk of forwarding free-text search to the backend
todos.fix: Add a case with referenceNumber: 'a b&c' asserting the URL contains referenceNumber=a+b%26c
